items.title: Initial substrate proposal
items.body: Outline the typed-substrate shape: per-kind JSON files under .project/, closure-table relations, opaque canonical_id with mutable display_name.

items.title: Lens primitive sketch
items.body: Lens = composition over a target block. Two kinds: target lens (one block) and composition lens (lens-of-lenses). Cycle detection at evaluation time.

items.title: Coverage-rank ranker port
items.body: Lift coverage-rank from pi-memctx. Keyword overlap plus position weighting plus frequency. Build buildIdIndex over typed substrate at load time. UPDATED: now also includes recency-decay weighting per FGAP-007 staleness-engine spec.

items.title: Anti-injection delimiter contract
items.body: Every injected block content wraps in framework-level delimiters. Wrap, never strip — substrate fidelity preserved for forensic review.

items.title: Content-hash skip detection
items.body: SHA-256 over canonicalized item content with timestamps stripped. Re-render only when hash differs from cached value. Sidecar or embedded field.
